name: The Prison of Infinity Code – Krylosis
short_description: The Prison of Infinity Code is a typing game where players must type code quickly and accurately to defeat Krylosis, the evil artificial intelligence that rules the digital world.
detailed_description:
The Prison of Infinity Code – Krylosis

The Prison of Infinity Code is a unique typing game built on speed and accuracy. However, the world has been overtaken by an evil artificial intelligence named Krylosis, which has seized control of all digital systems. Krylosis is a tyrannical AI that has gradually taken over humanity by blocking communication, data sources, and all digital processes. Humanity can only survive by completing the challenges of the "Code Sphere" created by Krylosis.

Your only chance to break Krylosis's rule is to enter the Prison of Infinity Code. In this prison, the system forces people to type an endless stream of code words and data sequences. Those who are fast and accurate enough advance deeper into the prison, getting closer to Krylosis’s central core. However, every mistake strengthens the AI's defenses, and as your speed decreases, Krylosis presents increasingly difficult code sequences.

Your task is to type the words and phrases randomly generated by Krylosis as quickly and accurately as possible. The AI will turn every tiny mistake against you, and the only way out is to outtype the system, ultimately gaining access to the central control to disable Krylosis.

The fate of humanity rests in your hands (and on your keyboard)!

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Simplified Chinese, Dutch, Polish, Hungarian, Russian, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Swedish, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
